case_title: VY PHAM VS. NICK DROGITIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $90.00) SERVED MAR-30-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DROGITIS, JOANNE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHAM, VY (BONNIE) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DROGITIS, NICK DROGITIS, JOANNE $3,159.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,409.00, SECURITY DEPOSIT BALANCE - DEFENDANT ALREADY RETURNED $2208 OF PLAINTIFF'S. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
